about.title: About
about.description: Lead Platform Architect at Viasat with 10+ years building enterprise-grade systems at Fortune 500 companies. Specialized in AI/ML platform architecture, cloud-native infrastructure, and technical leadership across automotive, airline, and satellite industries. Currently architecting next-generation AI platforms while staying hands-on with modern technologies.

philosophy.title: Agency is everything
philosophy.content: The work I'm proudest of happened because I just started. Most people would rather discuss than do. Most decisions are reversible and you're rewarded for moving first.

philosophy.title: Ship or die
philosophy.content: Speed wins. Fast iteration beats perfect planning. The barriers to shipping are usually imaginary.

philosophy.title: Being human matters more than ever
philosophy.content: AI commoditizes execution while human creativity becomes scarce. We're wired to value what other humans make. Authenticity compounds exponentially. Most people won't put themselves out there, so they never capture the value they create.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Available for high-impact consulting and architecture discussions.
contact.availability: Open to select side projects aligned with platform engineering and AI/ML.
